title: agentic-loop Configuration
description: Orchestrates agentic loops with tool calls, state management, and trajectory tracking

boid_enabled.description: Enable Boid-style agent coordination (position tracking and steering signals)

boid_signal_ttl.description: TTL for Boid steering signals before expiration (e.g. 30s or 1m)

consumer.description: JetStream consumer tuning for long-running ports (agent.task/agent.response/tool.result)

ack_wait.description: AckWait duration for long-running consumers (e.g. 90s or 5m)

heartbeat_interval.description: InProgress heartbeat interval (e.g. 60s or 2m). Must be less than ack_wait

max_deliver.description: Maximum redelivery attempts for long-running consumers

content_bucket.description: NATS ObjectStore bucket for trajectory step content (tool results and model responses)

context.description: Context window management. Model limits are resolved from the model registry

compact_threshold.description: Utilization threshold (0.01-1.0) that triggers context compaction

enabled.description: Deprecated: context management is always enabled (required for Gemini compatibility)

entity_priority.description: Priority for entity context vs conversation (1-10, higher = more entity context)

headroom_ratio.description: Fraction of model context to reserve for responses (0.0-0.5). Takes precedence over headroom_tokens when the computed value is larger

headroom_tokens.description: Minimum token headroom floor — ratio-based headroom never goes below this value

max_budget_tokens.description: Hard token limit for context budget (overrides model limits when set)

preserve_entities.description: Entity IDs to always keep in context during slicing

slice_on_budget.description: Enable context slicing when budget is exceeded

delete_consumer_on_stop.description: Delete durable consumers on Stop (use for tests only)

loops_bucket.description: NATS KV bucket name for storing loop state

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of iterations before loop terminates

ports.description: Port configuration for inputs and outputs

positions_bucket.description: NATS KV bucket name for boid agent positions

timeout.description: Timeout duration for loop execution (e.g. 120s or 5m)

tool_result_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes for tool result content before truncation. 0 means no limit

trajectory_cache_ttl.description: TTL for trajectory cache (e.g. 4h or 30m). Trajectories older than this are only available via graph queries

trajectory_detail.description: Trajectory detail level: summary (default) or full
